strong-3: Why do we need your documents?
text-5: As IQ Option Europe Ltd is regulated by CySEC (Cyprus Securities & Exchange Commission), we are required by law to fulfil the basic requirements pertaining to the suppression of money laundering and terrorist financing. In order to take advantage of the benefits of trading with a regulated entity, it is important to note that you must provide information and/or documentation to verify your account.
